<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="前端基建六大模块" id="infra-2"> <mxGraphModel dx="-514" dy="-212" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="980" pageHeight="720" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="G" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="前端基建体系（标准化 · 自动化 · 可复用）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="640" width="900" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="A" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;strokeWidth=2;" value="前端基建
